title: Irish Beef Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with tender beef, vegetables, and a rich broth.

ingredients.name: shattering bitter greens (such as kale or collard greens)

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the potatoes, carrots, and greens. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the stock, beef broth, and stew. Stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
